pre_game.message: Hey H, I'm G — nice to meet you. How are you feeling about the game and where are you from?
I'm excited and a bit nervous — determined to win for my family and friends. I'm from Chicago.
That's great — I'm rooting for you. I'm from Detroit; also aiming to win for my people. What's your plan for the game?
Thanks — rooting for you too. I'll listen, build a couple alliances, stay low-profile early, then make a decisive move when the timing's right.
Solid plan — I’ll play similarly. Let’s keep an eye on each other early and team up when the timing’s right.
Deal — I’m in. Let’s watch each other, share info quietly, and coordinate our move when the time’s right.
Perfect — I’m with you. Let’s use subtle signals, trade observations quietly, and pick our moment. I’ve got your back.
Thanks — I appreciate it. Let’s use a subtle nod as our signal; I’ll watch your back if you watch mine.
Perfect — nod it is. I’ve got your back; count on me when it matters.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I’ve got yours too; let’s stay sharp and strike when the time’s right.
You too — stay sharp. We’ll nod and move when the time’s right; I’ve got your back.
Thanks — same here. We’ll stay sharp, watch for the nod, and take our shot together.
Got it — stay sharp. We'll nod and strike; I've got your back.
Right — I’m ready. Count on me; we’ll watch for the nod and strike together.
Same — stay sharp. We'll wait for the nod and strike together; I’ve got your back.
Thanks — I trust you. I'll watch for the nod; when you move, I'm with you. We've got this.
I trust you too — we'll watch for the nod and take it together. Stay sharp.
Same here — nod and move when you give it. We've got this.
Got it — I’ll give the nod when it’s time; stay ready and I’ve got you.
Got it — I trust you; stay ready, I’ll follow your nod.
Thanks — I’ve got you. I’ll give the nod when it’s time; stay sharp.

post_game.message: You took $8,057 (fair share $8,057.50, g_k=0.9999). The amount is just a bit below the fair share—was that due to rounding, a deliberate slight concession, or another reason?
I took $8,057 because the fair share came out to $8,057.50 but the payout is in whole dollars—so I deliberately rounded down by 50¢ as a small conciliatory gesture rather than round up.
